_comment: Freshness pin for the VENDORED security rule subset (epic b744 / WS5; ADR 0012). Bump `vendored_at` to the refresh date whenever `make vendor-security-rules` re-pins the families below. The CI freshness check (python -m rebar.grounding.detectors.security_pin) WARNS when `vendored_at` is older than `cadence_days`.
